response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling, including MCP and RAG-related work. However, his direct experience with building production-grade AI systems, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks is not explicitly documented, and his recent AI-agent work is more tooling-focused than core AI system design. His strong TypeScript and Node.js background aligns well, but gaps in core GenAI experience and leadership in stakeholder-facing technical discovery limit his score.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, demonstrating familiarity with GenAI tooling
Proven ability to lead technical projects (e.g., GISCollective, WatchUp TV app) and mentor teams (TDD/Pairing at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems in production systems
No clear evidence of leading AI system design or customer-facing technical discovery sessions
Background is more general full-stack/cloud rather than specialized GenAI engineering

key_factors.factor: AI system design and production experience
